description: Extend the Playwright E2E tests in server/test/ui.e2e.mjs with at least 15 new browser checks covering the new features: Kids Day view, Timeline/Ablaufplan view, Dokumenten-Hub view, and DND mode toggle.
steps: In server/test/ui.e2e.mjs, after the existing management navigation tests and before the Actor section (section 2), add new test checks for the new views. The desktop shell routes are: 'kidsday' (Kids Day), 'timeline' (Ablaufplan), 'dokumente' (Dokumente). Navigate using `mg.evaluate((x) => { location.hash = '#/' + x; }, viewName)` followed by waitForTimeout(700) as done in existing tests.

Add Kids Day view tests (at least 3 checks): navigate to #/kidsday, verify the view renders (no .mod-off), check for KPI elements or configuration panels (look for text like 'Kids Day', 'Altersgruppen', intensity controls), verify maze configuration cards are shown.

Add Timeline/Ablaufplan view tests (at least 4 checks): navigate to #/timeline, verify blocks panel renders with the 6 seeded blocks, check for freeze/unfreeze button presence, test creating a delay (POST /api/timeline/delay via the UI or API call and verify UI updates), check version history panel existence.

Add Dokumenten-Hub view tests (at least 4 checks): navigate to #/dokumente, verify the 3 seeded documents appear, check category filter chips are present, verify pinned documents are shown first, test opening a document (click on one and check sheet/overlay appears with content).

Add DND mode tests (at least 4 checks): On the actor page (ctx2/ac), navigate to the profile section, find the DND toggle/panel, enable DND via the UI or API (POST /api/dnd/enable with actor token), verify badge 'DND' appears in the phone shell header, disable DND and verify badge disappears.
Take screenshots for each new view section (continue numbering from existing shots, e.g. 17-mgmt-kidsday.png, 18-mgmt-timeline.png, 19-mgmt-dokumente.png, 20-actor-dnd.png).
acceptance_criteria: server/test/ui.e2e.mjs contains at least 15 new ok() assertions beyond the original 47
The new tests cover all 4 feature areas: Kids Day, Timeline, Dokumente, DND
The test file is syntactically valid JavaScript (no syntax errors when parsed)
npm test still passes (the E2E tests are separate from npm test, but smoke tests must not break)
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/HORRORGETICON-OPS and confirm all tests pass
Run `node --check server/test/ui.e2e.mjs` to verify no syntax errors
findings: Added 19 new ok() assertions (4 Kids Day, 5 Timeline, 6 Dokumenten-Hub, 4 DND). All placed after Fahrgruppen test in section 1 for management views, and after existing Actor tests before section 3 for DND. Screenshots numbered 17-20. npm test passes (241 checks). node --check confirms no syntax errors.
